en.text: ! how is she become as a widow
with her, they are become her enemies
. because of great: Heb. for the greatness of servitude
that she had in the days
. is: Heb. is become a removing, or, wandering
. to: or, to make the soul to come again
Is it nothing to you, all ye that pass
. Is it: or, It is nothing pass by: Heb. pass by the way?
, from whom I am not able
. the virgin: or, the winepress of the virgin, etc
, and there is none to comfort
unto them, as thou hast done
unto me for all my transgressions
thereof. brought: Heb. made to touch
. all: Heb. all the desirable of the eye
And he hath violently taken away
, as if it were of a garden
What thing shall I take to witness
to thee, that I may comfort
for thee: and they have not discovered
: and he hath caused thine enemy
over thee, he hath set up
? of a span: or, swaddled with their hands?
Surely against me is he turned
me about, that I cannot get out
He was unto me as a bear
. covered: or, rolled me in the ashes
. recall: Heb. make to return to my heart
that a man should both hope
; if so be there may be
, the most High: or, a superior
not. approveth not: or, seeth not
, and it cometh to pass, when the Lord
for the punishment of his sins
. mine heart: Heb. my soul because: or, more than all
unto them. sorrow: or, obstinacy of heart
to the roof of his mouth
For the punishment of the iniquity
on her. punishment of the iniquity: or, iniquity
, it is become like a stick
through for want of the fruits
. so: or, in that they could not but touch
through unto thee: thou shalt be drunken
. The: or, Thine iniquity discover: or, carry thee captive for thy sins
, what is come upon us: consider
unto us. is: Heb. cometh for price
. Our: Heb. On our necks are we persecuted
over us: there is none that doth deliver
with the peril of our lives
unto us, that we have sinned
! The: Heb. The crown of our head is fallen
? so: Heb. for length of days?
thou us unto thee, O LORD
against us. But: or, For wilt thou utterly reject us?
